page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn8ia.8xlarge is a GPU-accelerated virtual machine instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores powered by an AMD EPYC 9T34 processor operating at a clock speed of 3.4 GHz. The x86_64 architecture is paired with 256.0 GB of system memory, providing a ratio of 8.0 GB of RAM per core.

The instance is equipped with a single NVIDIA L20 GPU based on the Ada Lovelace architecture, delivering 48 GB of dedicated VRAM. This server does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 20 Gbps.

Given the dedicated AMD EPYC CPU cores and the high-capacity NVIDIA L20 GPU, this instance offers a balanced resource density for workloads requiring parallel processing and substantial memory capacity without the overhead of local storage. It is suitable for workloads such as machine learning inference, data science, graphics rendering, and compute-heavy GPU-accelerated applications.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn8ia.8xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance designed for compute-intensive and parallel processing workloads. Powered by the KVM hypervisor, it features 32 dedicated physical cores of an AMD EPYC 9T34 processor running at 3.4 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The hardware configuration includes 256.0 GB of system memory, yielding 8.0 GB of RAM per core, alongside a single NVIDIA L20 GPU from the Ada Lovelace architecture with 48 GB of VRAM. This instance does not feature local storage, relying instead on network-attached storage options, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 20 Gbps. The combination of dedicated AMD EPYC processing power and a high-capacity GPU makes this server suitable for machine learning inference, data science, and graphics rendering workloads.
